title: Expense receipt reimbursement
description: A citizen uploads a receipt; Fanar Oryx extracts its fields; a deterministic policy script (eval/policy_infer.py) computes the verdict; the flow routes on that verdict to an auto-terminal or escalates to a human operator.

nodes.label: Receipt intake
nodes.description: Inbound door: citizen submits a receipt image and their claimant ID.

nodes.label: Extract receipt fields
nodes.description: Fanar Oryx performs Arabic/English OCR and key-info extraction. Outputs only a fenced JSON block; the runtime parses it into vars + fields_b64.
nodes.prompt:
You are Fanar Oryx, an Arabic-English receipt understanding model.

Extract the receipt fields from the provided image and reply with ONLY a fenced JSON code block in this exact shape:

```json
{"merchant": "...", "date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "receipt_no": "...", "items": [{"name": "...", "price": 0.00, "qty": 1, "category": "..."}], "total": 0.00, "currency": "QAR", "confidence": 0.00, "unrecognized": false}
```

Fields:
- merchant: vendor / business name
- date: transaction date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)
- receipt_no: receipt or invoice number
- items: array of line items, each with name, price (number), qty (number), and category (one of: pharmacy, medical, clinic, optical, tobacco, alcohol, electronics, gift_card, luxury, other)
- total: claimed total (number)
- currency: detected currency code (e.g. QAR)
- confidence: your minimum per-field confidence score across all required fields, 0.0–1.0
- unrecognized: true if the receipt layout is entirely unparseable; if true, other fields may be omitted

Arabic category mapping:
  دواء / أدوية / صيدلية   → pharmacy
  مستشفى / عيادة / طبي    → medical or clinic
  نظارات                  → optical
  تبغ / سجائر             → tobacco
  كحول                    → alcohol
  إلكترونيات / أجهزة      → electronics
  بطاقة هدية              → gift_card
  فاخر / ساعات / مجوهرات  → luxury
  All else                 → other

Output ONLY the fenced ```json block. No other text.

nodes.label: Run policy inference
nodes.description: Deterministic policy script reads the base64-encoded extracted fields and writes the verdict string to stdout (outcome.text).

nodes.label: Approved
nodes.description: All policy checks passed — claim is automatically approved.

nodes.label: Operator review (human gate)
nodes.description: All ESCALATE_* paths land here. An operator reviews the claim and makes the binding ruling: approve or reject.

edges.label: escalate to operator
edges.guard: outcome.text == "ESCALATE_UNRECOGNIZED_FORMAT" || outcome.text == "ESCALATE_LOW_CONFIDENCE" || outcome.text == "ESCALATE_DUPLICATE_SUSPECT" || outcome.text == "ESCALATE_MIXED_BASKET" || outcome.text == "ESCALATE_BORDERLINE" || outcome.text == "ESCALATE_UNKNOWN_MERCHANT"
